name: Achievement Display Cabinet
short_description: Achievement Display Cabinet is a casual game with 3 built-in mini games.You can earn Steam achievements by completing game tasks and decorate your Steam personal homepage with these achievements.
detailed_description:
In this racing based casual game, stay away from danger and let yourself go further!
Prepare for almost impossible challenges in the racing world. When you jump, avoid, and move forward in dangerous passages and sharp obstacles, use your skills to the limit.
Game features
A casual game based on racing!
Many achievements and rewards!
Challenge yourself with almost impossible things!
